shortReview: Here's the honest truth about the Clara Zilvia set: it is genuinely impressive for fashion jewellery. The 925 Sterling Silver base means you're wearing real silver — pick it up and you'll notice it has actual weight and substance, unlike the feather-light alloy pieces that dominate the sub-₹500 market. The Swiss Zirconia stones are the highlight — in indoor lighting, they sparkle almost identically to real diamonds. I'd challenge most people to tell the difference without a loupe. The platinum plating feels smooth to the touch and gives the set a cool, white-gold look rather than the warm yellowy tone of gold plating. Getting a matching pendant, earrings, chain, and ring at this price is strong value — buying these pieces separately from different brands would cost more and risk mismatched tones. The only real downside: like all plated jewellery, the finish has a lifespan. Wear it to weddings and dinners, but don't shower in it or wear it to the gym. Store it in the included box when not in use, and it'll serve you for years.

The plating will start showing wear at contact points — where your finger meets the band, where the ring rests against surfaces. That's normal for any plated ring at this price. At ₹209, even if it lasts only three months, that's under ₹70 per month for a ring you wear every day — genuinely hard to beat.
